Table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Card of table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Name

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Code

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data:

DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

SELECT

f.country_refcode AS COUNTRY_CODE,

f.flavours_flavour_refcode AS FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_CODE_BK,

f.flavours_flavour_refname AS FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_NAME,

f.identity_unique_identifier AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

f.interaction_id AS INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(f.date_time) AS INTERACTION_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN INTERACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL

AND (f.dup_cnt = 1 OR f.rn_by_load_ts = 1)

THEN INTERACTION_DATETIME

ELSE f.__load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [VALID_TO]

-- [ACTIVE_FLAG]

FROM (

SELECT

f.*,

COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY f.identity_unique_identifier, f.interaction_id, f.flavours_flavour_refcode, f.date_time

) AS dup_cnt,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY f.identity_unique_identifier, f.interaction_id, f.flavours_flavour_refcode, f.date_time

ORDER BY f.__load_ts ASC

) AS rn_by_load_ts

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR f WHERE TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(f.date_time) <= f.__LOAD_TS OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(f.date_time) IS NULL

) f;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: identity_unique_identifier, interaction_id, flavours_flavour_refcode

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PII data

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level.

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add RDE_BRIDGE_CONSUMER_RLS to sharing script

 

SELECT f.*

FROM MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR f

JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = f.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND f.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND f.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR f.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_INTERACTION


Check constraint name of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

CKT_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_F


Server validation rule of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

drop table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_NAME TEXT,
INTERACTION_DATETIME DATE,
VALID_FROM DATE not null,
VALID_TO DATE not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FL primary key (FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_CODE_BK, IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR set comment = 'The Interaction Flavour table captures information about the specific flavour used by a consumer during an interaction. By enriching interaction records with product-specific flavour details, this table supports analysis of consumer preferences, product usage patterns, and market-level flavour trends.';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique original identifier of the user (identity_unique_identifier)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique ID of the interaction. Reference data: Action_ID (interaction_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_CODE_BK is
'Code of the flavour of the Heets used during the interaction (flavours_flavour_refcode)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code; Reference Data: Country (country_refcode)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.FLAVOUR_REFERENCE_NAME is
'Name of the flavour of the Heets used during the interaction (flavours_flavour_refname)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.INTERACTION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the interaction date (date_time)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active ';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

VALID_FROM: Indicates when record validity begins, based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR

VALID_TO: Indicates the datetime till when the record was valid based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_FLAVOUR
